metadata.description: Azure region for resources (South Africa North per SARB data residency)
Project name used for resource naming
Azure AD (Entra ID) Object ID for PostgreSQL Admin
Azure AD (Entra ID) Admin display name
Tags to apply to all resources

properties.description: Alert when API response time exceeds 1 second (95th percentile)
Alert when API error rate exceeds 5%
Alert when USSD session success rate drops below 90%

allOf.query: customMetrics | where name == "USSDSessionCompleted" | summarize SuccessRate = (todouble(sum(valueCount)) / todouble(count())) * 100

properties.description: Alert when API is down for more than 5 minutes

allOf.query: requests | where success == false and resultCode startswith "5" | summarize FailedCount = count() by bin(timestamp, 1m)

metadata.description: Log Analytics Workspace ID for diagnostics

properties.value: Placeholder - will be set by deployment pipeline

metadata.description: Log Analytics Workspace ID for diagnostics
Log Analytics Workspace ID for diagnostics
Azure AD Object ID for PostgreSQL Admin
Log Analytics Workspace ID for diagnostics
Log Analytics Workspace ID for diagnostics
Backend API URL from Container Apps

properties.value:
<policies>
        <inbound>
          <base />
          <!-- Rate limiting: 100 requests per minute per subscription key (NF-02) -->
          <rate-limit-by-key calls="100" renewal-period="60" counter-key="@(context.Subscription.Id)" />
          
          <!-- CORS for web dashboard -->
          <cors allow-credentials="false">
            <allowed-origins>
              <origin>https://chairperson-dashboard.stokvel.bank</origin>
            </allowed-origins>
            <allowed-methods>
              <method>GET</method>
              <method>POST</method>
              <method>PUT</method>
              <method>DELETE</method>
            </allowed-methods>
            <allowed-headers>
              <header>*</header>
            </allowed-headers>
          </cors>
          
          <!-- Forward to backend -->
          <set-backend-service backend-id="stokvel-backend-api" />
        </inbound>
        <backend>
          <base />
        </backend>
        <outbound>
          <base />
        </outbound>
        <on-error>
          <base />
        </on-error>
      </policies>

<policies>
        <inbound>
          <base />
          <!-- Rate limiting: 100 requests per minute per MNO -->
          <rate-limit-by-key calls="100" renewal-period="60" counter-key="@(context.Request.IpAddress)" />
          
          <!-- Validate MNO signature (placeholder - implement with JWT or HMAC) -->
          <validate-jwt header-name="Authorization" failed-validation-httpcode="401" failed-validation-error-message="Unauthorized MNO">
            <issuer-signing-keys>
              <key>{{MNO-Signature-Key}}</key>
            </issuer-signing-keys>
          </validate-jwt>
          
          <!-- Forward to backend -->
          <set-backend-service backend-id="stokvel-backend-api" />
        </inbound>
        <backend>
          <base />
        </backend>
        <outbound>
          <base />
        </outbound>
        <on-error>
          <base />
        </on-error>
      </policies>

properties.description: Product for MNO USSD gateway integration
